MSBMisc 0.0.1.15
  • Reference

MSBMisc

A light weight package of some functions I wrote for myself.

If you find then useful - cool! If you fina any bugs, let me know!

You can see a list of all functions here.

Install

You can install the package from my R-Universe:

install.packages("MSBMisc", repos = "https://mattansb.r-universe.dev")
